'''hadhuhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:vaad|vaad]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-dh-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vaad|vaad]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| hadhuhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hædhihith|hædhihith]] || [[word:hædhihij|hædhihij]] || [[word:hædhihish|hædhihish]] || [[word:hædhihi|hædhihi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hadhudhuhuth|hadhudhuhuth]] || [[word:hadhudhuhuj|hadhudhuhuj]] || [[word:hadhudhuhush|hadhudhuhush]] || [[word:hadhudhuhu|hadhudhuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hadhuhuth|hadhuhuth]] || [[word:hadhuhuj|hadhuhuj]] || [[word:hadhuhush|hadhuhush]] || [[word:hadhuhu|hadhuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hadhufhuth|hadhufhuth]] || [[word:hadhufhuj|hadhufhuj]] || [[word:hadhufhush|hadhufhush]] || [[word:hadhufhuf|hadhufhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hadhuhuthu|hadhuhuthu]] || [[word:hadhuhuju|hadhuhuju]] || [[word:hadhuhushu|hadhuhushu]] || [[word:hadhuhuku|hadhuhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hadhuhuth|hadhuhuth]] || [[word:hadhuhuj|hadhuhuj]] || [[word:hadhuhush|hadhuhush]] || [[word:hadhuhu|hadhuhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hadhuhuthul|hadhuhuthul]] || [[word:hadhuhujul|hadhuhujul]] || [[word:hadhuhushul|hadhuhushul]] || [[word:hadhuhukul|hadhuhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hadhuhuthuthu|hadhuhuthuthu]] || [[word:hadhuhujuju|hadhuhujuju]] || [[word:hadhuhushushu|hadhuhushushu]] || [[word:hadhuhuku|hadhuhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hadhuhuthun|hadhuhuthun]] || [[word:hadhuhujun|hadhuhujun]] || [[word:hadhuhushun|hadhuhushun]] || [[word:hadhuhukun|hadhuhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hadhuhuthuoro|hadhuhuthuoro]] || [[word:hadhuhujuoro|hadhuhujuoro]] || [[word:hadhuhushuoro|hadhuhushuoro]] || [[word:hadhuhukuoro|hadhuhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
